updates.content: Vumatel Technicians are attending to any services that remain down.
Vumatel technicians, in collaboration with KWCE, are actively engaging with the relevant parties regarding the wayleave progress. No concrete feedback has been received as yet.

Vumatel Technicians are on site localising the fault. Awaiting approval to make sure they can work off the 3rd contractors wayleaves. Wayleave approval is still pending and could take several days. We apologise for any inconvenience caused.

closed.resolution:
Dear Valued Business Partner,

Please note that the fibre services in Sagewood, 28 Camelford Road, New Redruth, Alberton have been restored. 

Please contact your Dedicated Key Account Agent if you have any further queries or your client/s are still experiencing connectivity issues in the restored area.
